Interface ScheduleService

All Known Implementing Classes:
JdbcScheduleService, MockScheduleService
public interface ScheduleService
Defines the scheduling operations exposed to the smart-home UI and services.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Schedule
    addSchedule(String name, String deviceId, String deviceName, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
    Creates and stores a new schedule.
    boolean
    deleteSchedule(String scheduleId)
    Deletes a schedule.
    List<SchedulingConflict>
    detectConflicts(Schedule schedule)
    Detects scheduling conflicts for a schedule.
    boolean
    executeSchedule(String scheduleId)
    Executes the configured action for a schedule immediately.
    Schedule
    getScheduleById(String scheduleId)
    Finds a schedule by its identifier.
    Schedule
    getScheduleByName(String scheduleName)
    Finds a schedule by its display name.
    javafx.collections.ObservableList<Schedule>
    getSchedules()
    Returns all schedules currently managed by the service.
    boolean
    hasConflicts(String scheduleId)
    Checks whether a schedule conflicts with existing schedules.
    void
    startRecurringExecution()
    Starts background processing for recurring schedules.
    void
    stopRecurringExecution()
    Stops background processing for recurring schedules.
    boolean
    toggleSchedule(String scheduleId)
    Toggles whether a schedule is active.
    boolean
    updateSchedule(String scheduleId, String name, String deviceId, String deviceName, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
    Updates an existing schedule.

  • Method Details

    • getSchedules

      javafx.collections.ObservableList<Schedule> getSchedules()
      Returns all schedules currently managed by the service.
      Returns:
      observable list of schedules

    • getScheduleById

      Schedule getScheduleById(String scheduleId)
      Finds a schedule by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - unique schedule identifier
      Returns:
      matching schedule, or null when none exists

    • getScheduleByName

      Schedule getScheduleByName(String scheduleName)
      Finds a schedule by its display name.
      Parameters:
      scheduleName - schedule name to look up
      Returns:
      matching schedule, or null when none exists

    • addSchedule

      Schedule addSchedule(String name, String deviceId, String deviceName, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
      Creates and stores a new schedule.
      Parameters:
      name - schedule name
      deviceId - target device identifier
      deviceName - target device display name
      action - action to execute
      time - execution time pattern
      recurrence - recurrence mode
      active - whether the schedule starts enabled
      Returns:
      created schedule

    • updateSchedule

      boolean updateSchedule(String scheduleId, String name, String deviceId, String deviceName, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
      Updates an existing schedule.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - identifier of the schedule to update
      name - updated schedule name
      deviceId - updated target device identifier
      deviceName - updated target device display name
      action - updated action to execute
      time - updated execution time pattern
      recurrence - updated recurrence mode
      active - updated enabled state
      Returns:
      true when the schedule was updated, otherwise false

    • toggleSchedule

      boolean toggleSchedule(String scheduleId)
      Toggles whether a schedule is active.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - identifier of the schedule to toggle
      Returns:
      true when the schedule exists and was toggled, otherwise false

    • deleteSchedule

      boolean deleteSchedule(String scheduleId)
      Deletes a schedule.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - identifier of the schedule to remove
      Returns:
      true when the schedule existed and was removed, otherwise false

    • executeSchedule

      boolean executeSchedule(String scheduleId)
      Executes the configured action for a schedule immediately.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - identifier of the schedule to execute
      Returns:
      true when the schedule existed and execution succeeded, otherwise false

    • startRecurringExecution

      void startRecurringExecution()
      Starts background processing for recurring schedules.

    • stopRecurringExecution

      void stopRecurringExecution()
      Stops background processing for recurring schedules.

    • detectConflicts

      List<SchedulingConflict> detectConflicts(Schedule schedule)
      Detects scheduling conflicts for a schedule.
      Parameters:
      schedule - the schedule to validate for conflicts
      Returns:
      list of detected conflicts (empty if none)

    • hasConflicts

      boolean hasConflicts(String scheduleId)
      Checks whether a schedule conflicts with existing schedules.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - identifier of the schedule being validated
      Returns:
      true when a conflict exists, otherwise false
